title: Order of Operations: Multiply Before Add

steps.instruction: List all operations in the expression.
steps.explanation: We must follow order of operations: multiply/divide before add/subtract.
Multiplication comes before addition in order of operations.
After handling multiplication, do the addition left to right.
Without order of operations, you might get (3+5)×2=16, which is wrong.
Division goes first, then left-to-right for add/subtract.

steps.instruction: Replace and evaluate left to right.
steps.explanation: After division, go left to right: subtract then add.
Always do multiplication and division before addition and subtraction.
